description_long: This is a slim, modern Samsung laptop with a matte black finish and a minimalist design. The lid features the Samsung logo in silver, positioned toward one corner. The screen is open, displaying a Windows operating system interface with a bright, high-resolution display. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and a large touchpad below it. Multiple ports are visible along the left side, including USB and audio jacks. The overall build appears lightweight, with a sturdy hinge and a sleek, professional appearance.
description: A sleek black Samsung laptop with a matte finish, visible logo, and a bright Windows display. It features a full keyboard, large touchpad, and multiple side ports.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the matte black lid with the Samsung logo in silver.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective revealing the open screen, keyboard, touchpad, and several ports along the left edge.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the full keyboard, large touchpad, and the illuminated Windows desktop on the screen.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective showing the open screen, keyboard, and additional ports on the right edge.
attribute_brand_logo: The Samsung logo is visible on the top lid, rendered in silver, positioned toward the right side, and consists of uppercase sans-serif letters.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows desktop interface with multiple application windows visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row at the top, standard alphanumeric keys, and a large touchpad below. No numeric keypad is present.
